steps.title: Eliminate y by setting equations equal
steps.content:
Since both equations equal $y$, we can set them equal to each other:
$$8x = x^2 - 20$$
Move all terms to one side:
$$x^2 - 8x - 20 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic and apply the constraint
steps.content:
Factor by finding two numbers that multiply to $-20$ and add to $-8$: those are $-10$ and $2$.
$$(x - 10)(x + 2) = 0$$
This gives $x = 10$ or $x = -2$. Since we need $x > 0$, the answer is $x = 10$.
